input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.16 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.16
            TITLE: component protection

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.16: Component Protection
F.5.16 Component Protection  
When specified in the rules, components must be protected by one or both of:  
a. Fully Triangulated structure with tubes meeting F.3.2.1.n  
b. Structure Equivalent to the above, as determined per F.4.1.3

final_answer: rule F.5.16: Component Protection F.5.16 Component Protection When specified in the rules, components must be protected by one or both of: a. Fully Triangulated structure with tubes meeting F.3.2.1.n b. Structure Equivalent to the above, as determined per F.4.1.3
